Hero.subtitle: Sana Archicons combines construction advisory, energy consulting and AI consultancy with process automation — for smarter, more sustainable and future-proof results.

Services.title: Our services
Services.subtitle: From construction advice to AI implementation — concrete, measurable and tailored to your organisation.
Services.s1Desc: Professional construction advice for renovations, refurbishments and new-build projects — from technical surveys to on-site supervision.
Services.s2Desc: An energy scan plus a concrete improvement plan with measures — insulation, installations, generation — ranked by cost and payback period. Including sustainability advice and support with subsidy applications, so you reach a better energy label step by step.
Services.s3Desc: Websites, AI agents, process automation, maintenance and advice — everything to work smarter, faster and more efficiently with AI.
Services.s5Desc: As a certified advisor we draw up the official energy label for your home and register it in line with current regulations — including the new energy label from 29 May 2026.
Services.s6Desc: An objective points assessment under the Dutch housing valuation system (WWS) — we determine the number of points and the maximum (legal) rent of your property, including the impact of floor area, amenities and energy label.

EnergyLabel.title: What does your label mean, and what can you improve?
EnergyLabel.subtitle: Click a class to see what it means — and the next step we usually recommend.
EnergyLabel.hint: Energy index per class (indicative values) — click or use the Tab key to explore.
EnergyLabel.groupLabel: Energy label classes A+++++ through G
EnergyLabel.detailDefault: Click a label to see the explanation and our advice.

Aplus5.toelichting: The most efficient class — a (near) energy-neutral home with top insulation, efficient systems and its own generation.
Aplus5.advies: Nothing to improve label-wise; focus on comfort, monitoring and smart energy management.

Aplus4.toelichting: Very good insulation, a heat pump and solar panels keep consumption to a minimum.
Aplus4.advies: Maintain the level; small optimisations in generation or storage (home battery) are still possible.

Aplus3.toelichting: High-quality insulation and efficient, often electric heating.
Aplus3.advies: With extra generation (solar) you reach the highest classes.

Aplus2.toelichting: Good insulation and an efficient heat source; a comfortable, economical home.
Aplus2.advies: Optimise insulation or add generation to climb further.

Aplus1.toelichting: Better than a standard A home, with above-average insulation and systems.
Aplus1.advies: Targeted improvements to glazing, insulation or systems take you to A++ or higher.

A.toelichting: A well-performing home with modern insulation and systems.
A.advies: With solar panels or a heat pump you move into the plus classes.

B.toelichting: A solid home with room for improvement.
B.advies: Improve insulation or systems to reach A or higher.

C.toelichting: Comparable to the average Dutch home — reasonable, but there is gain to be had.
C.advies: An improvement plan with insulation and a more efficient heat source moves you towards A or B.

D.toelichting: The home uses more than average; insulation and systems are partly outdated.
D.advies: Start with the shell (roof, façade, glazing); that delivers the most comfort and the fastest payback.

E.toelichting: Limited insulation and outdated systems lead to higher energy use.
E.advies: A phased improvement plan avoids unnecessary costs and often makes subsidies attainable.

F.toelichting: An energy-inefficient home with little insulation and inefficient heating.
F.advies: The greatest gains are here — we draw up a plan that fits your budget.

G.toelichting: The least efficient class: barely any insulation and heavily outdated systems.
G.advies: With a step-by-step plan and available subsidies, large leaps become possible.

EnergyPlan.title: Your improvement plan in four steps
EnergyPlan.subtitle: From survey to delivery — concrete, ranked by cost and payback period, with support for subsidies.

steps.title: Home survey
steps.desc: We map your home: year of construction, surfaces, insulation and installations — on site or based on documents.

steps.title: Energy label & scoring
steps.desc: A detailed scoring forms the basis for the official energy label and shows your current starting point.

steps.title: Tailored improvement plan
steps.desc: Concrete measures — insulation, installations, generation — ranked by cost and payback period, with the expected new label.

steps.title: Guidance & subsidy
steps.desc: We support implementation and subsidy applications (such as ISDE) so you benefit fully from available schemes.

AI.title: Smart websites, AI agents and worry-free maintenance
AI.subtitle: Our AI department builds modern websites and AI agents, automates your processes and keeps everything secure and up to date — so you can focus on your work.

offers.title: Website development
offers.desc: Fast, modern and mobile-friendly websites — from landing page to a complete business site, optimised to be found.

offers.title: Building AI agents
offers.desc: Tailor-made AI assistants and chatbots that answer questions, qualify leads and automate tasks — 24/7.

offers.title: Process automation
offers.desc: Smart workflows and integrations with AI tools that remove manual work — fewer errors, more focus on what truly matters.

offers.title: Website maintenance
offers.desc: A maintenance plan that keeps your site secure, fast and current: updates, backups, security and small changes.

offers.title: Advice & optimisation
offers.desc: We analyse your website and advise concrete improvements in speed, findability (SEO) and conversion.

AI.plansSubtitle: Yearly maintenance so your website stays secure, fast and up to date. Choose the plan that suits you.

plans.name: Basic
features: Up to 1 hour of small changes per month

plans.name: Plus
plans.desc: For growing businesses that stay active.
features: Up to 3 hours of changes per month

plans.name: Pro
plans.desc: For websites with AI agents and ongoing growth.

AI.quoteNote: Prefer a custom solution? Request a no-obligation quote.

WWS.title: Know the maximum rent your property may charge
WWS.subtitle: The Dutch housing valuation system (WWS) uses an objective points assessment to set the maximum (legal) rent of a self-contained home. We carry out that assessment precisely for you — so you can be sure you charge the right rent and demonstrably comply with the Affordable Rent Act.

factors.title: Floor area
factors.desc: Rooms and other spaces, measured precisely.

factors.title: Energy label
factors.desc: A better label directly earns more points.

factors.title: WOZ value
factors.desc: The official property value is factored in.

factors.title: Kitchen
factors.desc: Worktop length and the quality of the fit-out.

factors.title: Outdoor space
factors.desc: Garden, balcony, terrace or roof terrace.

factors.title: Heating
factors.desc: Type of heating and the number of heated rooms.

segments.label: Social rent
segments.desc: Regulated segment with a lower maximum rent.

segments.label: Mid-market rent
segments.desc: Regulated under the Affordable Rent Act since 1 July 2024.

segments.label: Free sector
segments.desc: Freely set rent, beyond the points cap.

WWS.note: Maximum rents and point thresholds are indexed annually. We always calculate with the current figures.
benefits: An objective, verifiable points assessment under the official WWS.
Certainty that you charge the right, maximum rent — neither too low nor too high.
Demonstrable compliance with the Affordable Rent Act, avoiding disputes and refunds.
A clear report you can use directly for renting out, purchase or valuation.
WWS.sourceText: Based on the Huurprijscheck of the Dutch Rent Tribunal (Huurcommissie).

About.title: About us
About.subtitle: Sana Archicons
About.lead: Sana Archicons is a Dutch advisory firm specialising in construction advisory, energy consulting and AI consultancy. We combine technical expertise with innovative technology for sustainable and future-oriented solutions.
About.mission: To help companies and property owners make smarter, more sustainable and more efficient decisions — by combining the power of AI with practical construction and energy knowledge.
About.vision: To become the natural partner for organisations that want intelligent, data-driven and sustainable solutions — accessible and personal.
About.founderBio: With more than 10 years of experience in construction and the energy sector, combined with in-depth knowledge of artificial intelligence, Hamid helps organisations take the step towards a smarter future.
About.exp1Desc: Technical surveys, architectural drawings, permit processes and supervision of refurbishments and renovations.
About.exp2Desc: Energy scans, EPA tailored advice, heat pumps, solar panels and subsidy applications (ISDE, SEEH).
About.exp3Desc: AI strategy, process automation, data utilisation and implementation of AI tools in existing business processes.
